allow: PowerShell(npx eslint src/components/Feedback.tsx src/components/Hud.tsx src/components/OpponentPanel.tsx src/components/RangeChartModal.tsx src/hooks/useGame.ts src/analysis/grade.ts src/strategy/handClass.ts src/engine/board.ts src/ai/profiles.ts 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)
